introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.summary: Build the mental model, vocabulary, and why this topic matters.

introduction.aiContext: Segment Tree / Introduction: Build the mental model, vocabulary, and why this topic matters.

introduction.timeComplexity: Depends on the dominant loop, recursion, or data-structure operation.
introduction.spaceComplexity: Count auxiliary structures and recursion stack separately.
commonMistakes: Skipping edge cases before coding.
Mixing up indexes, boundaries, or state updates.
Stating complexity without identifying the dominant operation.
interviewTips: Discuss tradeoffs and when this part should be used.
practiceProblems: Implement Introduction from scratch.
